label: **Window &  Transparency**
Enable *transparent* browser windows (~browser restart maybe required to take effect~).
Enable *better blur* for context menu (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0.1))`]; ensure your OS has proper blur support~).
Enable *transparent* Glance.
*Force transparency* using clip-path (~use this only if the ways mentioned to get transparency in *readme.md* doesn't work~).
**Arc UI / Interface**
Custom *UI Tint* for browser (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.25), rgba(0,0,0,0.25))`]; works if no Workspace Theme color is selected~).

Custom *Website Tint* for browser (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0.1))`]; works if no Workspace Theme color is selected, only on transparent websites~).
Custom *border radius* for various elements in Arc (~enter value between 0px and 25px~).
Edit Zen window margin width between web-view and border (~enter value between 0 to 12; value set here will be overriden by whatever mode is for *No Gaps*~).
Enable *Arc Menu Icon*
Disable *Menu Animations*.
Choose mode for *No Gaps* (~*margin width* set above would be overriden by whatever mode is chosen~).
Remove highlight on tab when in split mode
Remove shadow emited by the website
Force *window controls* to left side (~restart~)
Enable *macOS-style* window buttons.
Disable Status Bar (URL info that appears on bottom left of web-view when you hover on a link).
**URL Bar Options**
When typed something by *clicking* on the URL bar, opens a **new tab** instead of modifying the current tab.
*Shorten URL* to only show domain name.
*Left*-align URL instead of default *Center*-alignment.
Disable *background zoom blur* when URL bar popup.
Hide *search results* when opening URL Bar.
*Animation* for URL Bar when focused (~Won't work if Arcline-like URL Bar is enabled~).
Enables *Arcline-like* URL Bar.
URL Bar *Opacity* (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.5), rgba(0,0,0,0.5))]~).
URL Bar *Blur* (~enter value between 0 and 50 [for ex.: 25px]~).
URL Bar *Saturation* (~enter value between 0 and 2~).
URL Bar *Contrast* (~enter value between 0 and 1~).
**Sidebar / Compact mode**
Other Sidebar *opacity* (~Bookmarks, History, Synced Tabs, and AI Chatbot Sidebar; enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.25), rgba(0,0,0,0.25))`]~)
Compact Sidebar *opacity* (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.5), rgba(0,0,0,0.5))`]~).
Compact Sidebar *Blur* (~enter value between 0 and 50px~).
Compact Sidebar *Saturation* (~enter value between 0 and 2~)
Compact Sidebar *Contrast* (~enter value between 0 and 1~)
*Custom* Compact Sidebar size (~enter value between 15em and 30em as per your preference~).
**Tabs &  Tab Animations**
Enable *Tab Groups*
Disable *animations* for hover and click on tabs.
Disable *vertically*-aligned split tabs to get Zen's default *horizontally*-aligned ones.
Disable *audio playing indicator* in tab playing media.
Fade *unloaded tabs* in the background.
Add *unload button* to Essentials.
Custom favicon gradient opacity on Essentials
Arc Tab Groups (~disable if you are using Advanced Tab Groups mod~).
Enable *Background* for Folders.

Custom *Folder Background Color* (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(0,0,0,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0.125))`]; enter `var(--zen-primary-color)` to use chosen Workspace Theme color~).
Animation while the *website loads*.
Animation while *switching tabs*.

options.label: Smooth crossfade (scroll in split-mode might not work)

label: The duration (in **ms**) after which *tab unloading* occurs.
**Containers / Pinned Extensions / Workspaces**
Enable *Pinned Extensions UI* (~see README in Arc2.0 GitHub Repository to understand how to set this up~).
Enable *badge/text* on pinned extensions.
Remove the *workspace indicator*.
Edit *container styling*.
*Workspace icon* animation style.
**Media Player / PDF / View Experience**
Disable *Arc styling* for FindBar (~must disable when using **Browse Bot** mod~).
Custom *vertical position* for FindBar (~enter value between 0px and whatever under 1000px that feels right for you~).
Custom *horizontal position* for FindBar (~enter value between 0px and whatever under 50px that feels right for you~).
Custom *length* for FindBar (~enter value between 750px and 1000px~).
Custom *breadth* for FindBar (~enter value between 20px and 200px~).
Custom *background* for FindBar (~enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA [for ex.: `light-dark(rgba(255,255,255,0.5), rgba(0,0,0,0.5))`]~).
Custom *blur* for FindBar (~enter value between 0 and 50px~).
Custom *saturation* for FindBar (~enter value between 0 and 2~).
Custom *contrast* for FindBar (~enter value between 0 and 1~).
Enable *Media Controls Toolbar* to go bottom.
Disable *Arc stylings* on PiP.
Enable *Rounded Corners* for PiP window.
Disable *glassy look* from sidebar media miniplayer.
Disable *glow effects* on sidebar media miniplayer.
Enable *default Zen* styling for sidebar media miniplayer.
**Performance &  Memory Management**
Makes browser run on *performance efficient mode*.
Enable *Shift+Alt* AI link preview.
Memory threshold to activate *tab unloading* (~in MB~).
Number of sentences for *AI preview*.
**Fonts**
Select the *font* for browser (~restart for chosen font to take effect on browser pages~).
**Deta Loading animation**
Zen's default *Deta Loading Bar* (~disable to use Arc's Deta Loading Bar~).
Enable *Deta Loading Bar* (~a thin loading bar at the top/bottom of the window that indicates page loading; enable to use if you don't like Zen's default one or have **No-Gaps Mode** enabled~).
Use color from Zen browser *workspace theme* (~will override custom colors chosen below~).
Use only *left color* for the loading bar (~disable gradient~).
*Left color*
*Middle color*
*Right color* (enter CSS color value in HEX or RGBA)
*Thickness* of the loading bar (~enter value between 1px and 10px~).
*Custom Minimum Width* (~enter value between 10px and 30px~).
*Custom Maximum Width* (~enter value between 90px and 180px~).
*Custom gap* between loading bar and window edge (~enter value between 0px and 10px~).
Place loading bar at *top* (~unchecked = bottom~).
Enable *Box Shadow* for the loading bar.
Enable *Blur Effect* for the loading bar.
*Blur Intensity* (~enter value between 0px and 10px~).
